data.title: Trump-supported World Liberty's partner linked to sanctioned Cambodian scam company tied to blockchain resort project with sanctioned individuals.
data.description: Individuals associated with the Prince Group, who have been sanctioned by the U.S. Treasury, are reportedly linked to AB network's proposed project of a "blockchain theme resort." The number of individuals involved and the extent of their ties to the Prince Group have raised concerns about the legitimacy and potential risks associated with the development of the blockchain-themed resort.

data.title: Deluxe Merchant Services Announces New Financial Institution Partnership with Washington Trust Bank
data.description: In Minneapolis today, Deluxe, a renowned Payments and Data company traded on NYSE under the symbol DLX, revealed a fresh collaboration with Washington Trust Bank. Washington Trust Bank, the leading independently owned full-service commercial bank in the Pacific Northwest, boasts over $10 billion in assets and is based in Spokane, Washington. Under this new partnership, Washington Trust Bank has opted for Deluxe to bolster its merchant services program. Deluxe will offer a flexible payments platform, operational know-how, and specialized customer service to support Washington Trust Bank's operations.

data.title: Treasury Bond Auction Announcement - RIKB 27 0415 - RIKB 38 0215 - Switch Auction or Cash payment
data.description: The Government Debt Management is set to auction Treasury bonds in the Series on the Auction Date. The auction will take place between 10:30 a.m. and 11:00 a.m. Investors can participate in the auction for Treasury bonds with specific ISIN numbers and Maturity Dates as outlined in the provided table. Article 6 of the General Terms of Auction for Treasury bonds allows the option to purchase an additional 10% of the bonds. Following the auction, the Treasury bonds will be delivered electronically on the Settlement Date.

data.title: Westnet LLC acquires Low Voltage Installations Inc.
data.description: Westnet LLC, a frontrunner in fire station alerting, dispatch systems, and a patented aircraft emergency system, recently completed the acquisition of Low Voltage Installations, Inc. The announcement was made on April 8, 2026, in Huntington Beach, California. Westnet is known for its public safety technology platform and continues to lead the industry with this new venture.

data.title: DIAGNOS Provides an Update on Sales and Regulatory Activities for CARA
data.description: In BROSSARD, Quebec, on April 08, 2026, Diagnos Inc. (TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A), a company specializing in early detection of eye-related health using AI techniques, has issued an update on its flagship product CARA. The future version of CARA incorporates disease detection algorithms. This follows a press release dated January 13, 2026, regarding the regulatory pathway for the new version. Additionally, on April 1, 2026, the company announced the renewal of U.S. establishment registration and the ongoing commercialization of the legacy CARA version in the U.S.

data.title: Belkin SoundForm Inspire Headset for Kids Wins Tech & Learning Awards of Excellence: Best of 2025
data.description: In Los Angeles, Belkin, a prominent consumer electronics company with a 40-year history, revealed that its SoundForm Inspire Wired Over-Ear Headset for Kids has secured a victory in the Primary Education segment of the Tech & Learning Awards of Excellence: Best of 2025. The prestigious awards recognize outstanding educational technology from the previous year that has proven to be exceptional in aiding teachers, students, and education experts in educational settings.

data.title: Syndio Expands Executive Leadership Team to Accelerate Decision Intelligence for Pay
data.description: In Seattle, Syndio, a prominent company specializing in Decision Intelligence for Pay, revealed the addition of seven key executives in various departments like product, revenue, marketing, engineering, and customer success. This strategic move aims to support the company's growth trajectory as it enhances its platform, broadens its worldwide partner network, and addresses the escalating enterprise need for AI-driven pay solutions. Notable appointments include Erik Darby as President, Devin Luquist as Senior Vice President of Product, and Erin McClintock as Senior Vice President.

data.title: Visa Opens the Door to AI-Driven Shopping for Businesses Worldwide
data.description: In San Francisco, Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) introduced Intelligent Commerce Connect, a fresh solution simplifying businesses' access to AI-driven commerce. This innovative platform serves as a connection point for agent builders, merchants, and enablers to engage in agentic commerce, irrespective of network, protocol, or token vault used. With the rise in consumer dependence on AI agents for buying, businesses involved in agent construction, sales, or transactions stand to benefit greatly.

data.title: Origis Energy Secures Tax Equity from RBC for California Solar + Storage Project
data.description: In Miami on April 8, 2026, Origis Energy, a prominent clean energy company in the U.S., revealed securing $118 million in tax equity financing from RBC Community Investments for the Chalan Solar + Storage initiative in Kern County, California. This financing marks a significant step for Origis Energy in expanding its renewable energy projects.

data.title: In HelloNation, Custom Home Expert Ken Broadwater Explains the Value of Building on Rural Land in Central Virginia
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on April 8, 2026, Ken Broadwater from Ken Broadwater Homes, LLC discussed the appeal of investing in rural land in Central Virginia. As per a article from HelloNation, he highlighted the growing trend of families opting for rural properties to enjoy lifestyle advantages.
